title: Kenyan Beef Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful Kenyan-inspired beef bowl recipe. The springy onions and nostalgic spices add a unique twist to this classic dish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the springy onions, nostalgic spice mix, and Kenyan chilies. Stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the onions are translucent.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the beef mixture over a bowl, garnished with additional springy onions if desired.
Cook rice or other sides according to package instructions.
